message:
fix(runtime,supply_chain): improve lane scheduler starvation detection baseline and sync certification evaluation snapshots on promotion/demotion

Lane scheduler starvation detection (lane_scheduler.rs):
- Add first_queued_at_ms field to LaneCounters to track the timestamp
  when the first task was queued while the lane was at capacity, enabling
  starvation detection even before any task has completed
- Set first_queued_at_ms when a task is rejected due to cap exceeded and
  the queue was previously empty; clear it when the queue drains
- Refresh first_queued_at_ms on task completion: if queued work remains,
  reset baseline to current timestamp; otherwise clear it
- Change starvation check to measure elapsed time from
  first_queued_at_ms (falling back to last_completion_ms) instead of
  solely from last_completion_ms, so lanes that have never completed a
  task but have queued work will correctly trigger starvation after the
  configured window elapses
- Rename test to reflect new semantics: starvation is now detected
  before first completion once the window elapses, rather than being
  suppressed entirely for never-completed lanes
- Add new test verifying starvation fires for queued-but-never-completed
  lanes after the window, and update existing starvation test assertions
  to match the first_queued_at_ms baseline (elapsed=139ms from queue
  timestamp 1061 rather than from completion timestamp 1050)

Certification registry evaluation snapshot sync (certification.rs):
- Add refresh_manual_evaluation helper that updates the embedded
  CertificationEvaluation snapshot (level, max_achievable, explanation)
  whenever promote() or demote() changes a record's certification level,
  ensuring the evaluation snapshot stays consistent with the record's
  actual level after manual adjustments
- Call refresh_manual_evaluation from both promote() and demote() with
  appropriate detail messages
- Add tests verifying that both promotion and demotion correctly refresh
  the embedded evaluation snapshot fields
- Minor rustfmt reformatting of multi-line method chains in
  evaluate_certification and test assertions

Beads issue tracker updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
